---
title: "Hi! I'm Magdelyn Herzig."
---
I graduated from St. Catherine University with a B.A. in Geography and a B.S. in Data Science in December 2025. I am currently a Research Intern at the Metropolitan Council of the Twin Cities, working on a project using deep learning methods to delineate urban tree canopy.  My interests include remote sensing, equity analyses, deep learning, computer vision, natural language processing, and qualitative methodologies.
